creator: che@bein.link
text: According to its github (https://github.com/texane/stlink), the project is in active development, so updates might be needed really fast because new boards might not be supported with the old versions of this software. But, as far as I can see, the ports tree contains a "stable" version of the software which is really outdated. Based on the version from the ports tree, I created a port with the recent version. You can find it there: https://github.com/part1zano/stlink-freebsd-latest. I could maintain the updates in the port.
